creator: knu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Timed out.  Sorry, but we cannot have that huge patches in the ports tree, 
considering the maintenance in future. 

Instead, consider putting them on some ftp/http server and use them as 
distribution patches.  Also, maybe you should contact the patch maintainer 
and Samba team to ask if the patches could merge into the main tree. 
That's the best way to make your great effort available to the world!
